description:
Messaging, voice, directory and analytics software

Symphony is a messaging, voice, directory and analytics software. The Symphony Messaging desktop app provides a greater ability to control and monitor your notifications and makes it easier to re-size and switch between multiple workspaces than using the browser version.
What's Changed
- SDA-4832 - Bump SDA version 25.4.0 & electron version 35.0.0 by @KiranNiranjan in #2319
- electron@34.3.2 by @sbenmoussati in #2322
- SDA-4834 - SDA-4833 - SDA-4842 - SDA-4836 - fix issue related to miniview by @KiranNiranjan in #2323
- SDA-4844 - SDA-4843 - SDA-4842 - Fix windows shortcut & fix fullscreen & maximize state by @KiranNiranjan in #2325
- SDA-4732: Fixing bugs related by @NguyenTranHoangSym in #2327
- SDA-4838 Screen picker should be displayed on the screen that app is in by @sbenmoussati in #2329
- SDA-4732_Main: Fixing 3 remaining issues by @NguyenTranHoangSym in #2334
- SDA-4847 - SDA-4848 - Optimize mini view and fix mini state by @KiranNiranjan in #2332
- SDA-4850 Screen share indicator listener unsubscription by @sbenmoussati in #2335
- SDA-4847 - add generic listener for enter-full-screen & async leave-full-screen by @KiranNiranjan in #2338
- SDA-4846 - Close any instance of screen snippet window on capture by @KiranNiranjan in #2340
- SDA-4858 - Prevent keystroke Ctrl + Shift + M from propagating in Windows by @KiranNiranjan in #2342
- RTC-15390 - If height/width is used. That becomes the new minHeight/minWidth for the popout by @axeleriksson147 in #2346
- SDA-4862 - Bump electron & SDA version by @KiranNiranjan in #2347
- SDA-4862 - Remove desktop field by @KiranNiranjan in #2349
- SDA-4868 Update SDA description by @sbenmoussati in #2352
- SDA-4864 Snyk conf update by @sbenmoussati in #2354
- SDA-4866 - Apply workaround for focus issue by @KiranNiranjan in #2363
- SDA-4865 - Fix screen picker window focus issue by @KiranNiranjan in #2368
- SDA-4891 - Validate bounds on switching mini view by @KiranNiranjan in #2371
- SDA-4891 - Revert aero glass check for 25.4 by @KiranNiranjan in #2373
- SDA-4897 - Fix vulnerable path @babel by @KiranNiranjan in #2374
Full Changelog: https://github.com/finos/SymphonyElectron/compare/v25.3.0...v25.4.0
